channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Daytona 500 Weather: Forecast for Sunday's Race at Daytona International Speedway
item.description: Here's the projected weather for the 2026 Daytona 500 to kick off the NASCAR Cup Series season.

item.title: Jimmie Johnson's Final NASCAR Cup Race: 2027 Daytona 500 Will Be His Last
item.description: The seven-time NASCAR Cup Series champ will run his last Daytona 500 in 2027.

item.title: 2026 NFL Coaching/GM Tracker: Chiefs Tab Former Cowboys Star as RB Coach
item.description: The coaching carousel for the 2026 offseason continues to churn. Here are the latest news and rumors from around the NFL!

item.title: 2026 Daytona 500: Everything To Know About The Great American Race
item.description: What time is the race? How many laps are there? Which drivers are the favorites? Here's everything to know about the 2026 Daytona 500.

item.title: UFC CEO Dana White on Ram Return to NASCAR Truck Series: 'I Love Challenges'
item.description: UFC CEO Dana White discussed the role he played in getting Ram back in the NASCAR Craftsman Truck Series.

item.title: Bracketology: Don't sleep on this year's bubble
item.description: The Last Four In and First Four Out groupings feature teams with big wins -- and high potential for March.

item.title: Olympics men's hockey daily: U.S back in action against Denmark
item.description: Find the full schedule, scoring and goaltending leaders and group standings here.

item.title: 'I blew it': Malinin falls twice in Olympic shocker
item.description: American sensation "Quad God" Ilia Malinin fell twice in a disastrous free skate, allowing Kazakhstan's Mikhail Shaidorov to claim a stunning gold med...

item.title: Watch guide: UConn-Georgetown, Arizona-Texas Tech carry big stakes
item.description: With projected 1-seeds in high-profile games, the door is open for movement at the top of the bracket.

item.title: Source: Padres, Castellanos agree on 1-year deal
item.description: Free agent outfielder Nick Castellanos has agreed to a one-year deal with the Padres two days after his release by the Phillies, a source confirmed to...
